title: RINL – Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant – 9 Posts
shortInfo: Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited (RINL) Recruitment 2026 for 9 posts of Associate Advisor/Senior Consultant. Candidates with B.E/B.Sc/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RINL official website vizagsteel.com.
